rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes; they must be in component type scopes.
Use only valid AADL feature names or declared auxiliary variables in AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are properly declared or visible in the current scope.
Assignments in implementation scopes must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
AGREE expressions must have consistent types on both sides of binary operators.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers that are not present in the model's configured dependencies.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantee statements are only allowed in component type scopes.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in component implementation scopes.
Do not reference identifiers that are not declared or visible in the current AGREE annex.
Do not mix incompatible types in binary expressions without explicit conversion.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and error messages
